pageContext.name: Novice Ninja Onami (Warriors Alliance)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Novice Ninja Onami (Warriors Alliance) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates Onami figure. Standing at 8.9' tall the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates is seen in her blue novice ninja dress and sandals.  Don't miss your chance to add this anime figure to your One Piece collectibles display today!
